```mjs title=main.mjs
import { sep as external_path_sep } from "path";
import * as _rspack_external_fs from "fs";
import * as fsNs from "fs";

// path

// fs

// ./index.js







it("should combine a named external re-export with an imported external namespace re-export", async () => {
  const mod = await import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ "./main.mjs");

  expect(mod.sep).toBe(external_path_sep);
  expect(typeof mod.fsNs.readFile).toBe("function");
});

export { external_path_sep as sep, fsNs };

```
